text:
The Unnamed One-eyed Monster is a type of Greed Island monster. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 136 

Overview

It is a strange floating box-shaped creature with one eye which is able to move quite fast. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Gon and Killua encounter this monster while roaming Greed Island, and can do nothing about it, as Biscuit never taught the boys how to defeat it. 

Card

Unknown
